---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about, and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context
Links, screenshots, or any other relevant information.
